questions.question: SageMaker Training Jobs provide:
options: Managed, auto-terminating compute for ML training with any framework
questions.explanation: Spin up powerful instances for training, auto-terminate when done.

questions.question: SageMaker Endpoints are:
options: Managed REST APIs for real-time model inference -- auto-scaling, monitoring included
questions.explanation: predictor = estimator.deploy() creates a production inference endpoint.

questions.question: SageMaker Pipelines orchestrate:
options: Multi-step ML workflows (preprocessing -> training -> evaluation -> deployment) as reproducible DAGs
questions.explanation: Define steps declaratively. SageMaker runs them with tracking and conditional logic.

questions.question: SageMaker Feature Store provides:
options: A centralised managed store for ML features with online and offline access
questions.explanation: Avoids feature duplication across teams. Ensures training and serving use the same logic.

questions.question: SageMaker Model Monitor detects:
options: Data drift, data quality issues, and model quality degradation in production
questions.explanation: Schedule monitoring jobs. Get alerts when input distributions or model outputs change.

questions.question: The SageMaker execution role provides:
options: Permissions for SageMaker to access S3, ECR, CloudWatch on your behalf
questions.explanation: IAM role attached to SageMaker sessions.

questions.question: ml.p3.2xlarge vs ml.t3.medium:
options: p3.2xlarge: V100 GPU for training. t3.medium: cheap CPU for low-traffic inference
questions.explanation: Match instance to workload. GPU for training/heavy inference. CPU for light inference.

questions.question: SageMaker JumpStart is:
options: A hub of pre-trained models and solution templates deployable or fine-tunable with one click
questions.explanation: Hundreds of models (Llama, Stable Diffusion, etc.) ready to deploy without custom code.

questions.question: SageMaker Experiments tracks:
options: The full experiment lineage -- datasets, parameters, metrics, models -- across training runs
questions.explanation: Similar to MLflow. Integrated with SageMaker Pipelines for end-to-end reproducibility.

questions.question: SageMaker pricing model is:
options: Pay per second for training jobs and per hour for endpoints
questions.explanation: Training: billed for exact duration. Endpoints: billed hourly while running.
